data.body: Implemented doc-truth sweep: README bash narrative+prereqs+packaging note+test cmds fixed; event-schema.md gained WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP/COMMITS rows; __init__.py:559 false next_batch comment fixed; CLAUDE.md gained 6 MCP tools; architecture.md gained _io/; archived 2 stale planning docs under docs/archive/. import rebar OK, ruff clean.
